message:
🐛 Fix per-run hover: wire hover callbacks to left-panel guide row dots (#1123)

The per-run hover feature (PR #1120) only had hover callbacks on the
bottom dots inside the detail panel. Users naturally hover dots in the
left-panel guide rows. This lifts hoveredRun state to the parent
NightlyE2EStatus component so hovering any dot — in the guide row or
the detail panel — updates the model, GPU, and duration display.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
